changeSet.author: custom
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO plugins ( identifier, name, description, javascriptModuleFile, functionsViewTemplate, settingsViewTemplate, namelocalizationkey, settingsPermission, functionsPermission, deviceFunctionsPermission, enabledForDevice ) VALUES ( 'deviceinventory', 'Installed Apps', 'View all applications installed on devices', 'app/components/plugins/deviceinventory/deviceinventory.module.js', 'app/components/plugins/deviceinventory/views/deviceinventory.html', NULL, 'plugin.deviceinventory.localization.key.name', 'plugin_deviceinventory_access', 'plugin_deviceinventory_access', 'plugin_deviceinventory_access', TRUE );

changeSet.author: custom
custom
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE plugin_deviceinventory ( id serial NOT NULL CONSTRAINT plugin_deviceinventory_pr_key PRIMARY KEY, customerId INT NOT NULL REFERENCES customers (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, deviceId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES devices (id) ON DELETE CASCADE, lastUpdate BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, apps JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]' );
